title: Neelamperoor Palli Bhagavathi Temple
tagline: Neelamperoor Palli Bhagavathi Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Neelamperoor Palli Bhagavathi Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Bhagavathy, situated at Neelamperoor in Alappuzha district of Kerala, India.
overview.description: Neelamperoor Palli Bhagavathi Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Bhagavathy, situated at Neelamperoor in Alappuzha district of Kerala, India. The temple is known for padayani festival. The principal deity is Vanadurga (Durga or Kali).

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Neelamperoor
topPlaces.description: Neelamperoor is a village in Kuttanad, Alappuzha district, Kerala. It is famous for its backwaters, lakes and paddy fields.

topPlaces.name: Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary (also known as Vembanad Bird Sanctuary) is situated at Kumarakom in Kottayam taluk of Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala, on the banks of Vembanad Lake. Set in the Kerala Backwaters, the bird sanctuary is visited by many migratory bird species.

topPlaces.name: Kurichy
topPlaces.description: Kurichy is a village in Changanacherry Municipality in Kottayam district, in the southern Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Munroe Lighthouse
topPlaces.description: The Munroe Lighthouse is a landmark in Pazhukkanila area of Kottayam, Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kumarankary
topPlaces.description: Kumarankary is a village in Kuttanad, Alappuzha district, Kerala, India. It borders Kottayam and Alappuzha districts.

topPlaces.name: Kuzhimattom
topPlaces.description: Kuzhimattom is a small village in the Kottayam district of the Kerala state, India. It is about 11 km from Kottayam.

topPlaces.name: Vazhappally
topPlaces.description: Vazhappally is a suburb of Changanasserry Municipality, Kottayam District, in central Kerala. The famous Vazhappally Shiva Temple is situated in Vazhappally.

topPlaces.name: Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple
topPlaces.description: Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple is a Hindu temple located in Vazhappally near Changanassery in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala. The temple is administered by the Travancore Devaswom Board.

items.note: Neelamperoor is a village in Kuttanad, Alappuzha district, Kerala. It is famous for its backwaters, lakes and paddy fields.

Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary (also known as Vembanad Bird Sanctuary) is situated at Kumarakom in Kottayam taluk of Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala, on the banks of Vembanad Lake. Set in the Kerala Backwaters, the bird sanctuary is visited by many migratory bird species.

Vazhappally is a suburb of Changanasserry Municipality, Kottayam District, in central Kerala. The famous Vazhappally Shiva Temple is situated in Vazhappally.

Vazhappally Maha Siva Temple is a Hindu temple located in Vazhappally near Changanassery in Kottayam district in the Indian state of Kerala. The temple is administered by the Travancore Devaswom Board.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Neelamperoor Palli Bhagavathi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Neelamperoor Palli Bhagavathi Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Neelamperoor Palli Bhagavathi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (74 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (58 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Neelamperoor Palli Bhagavathi Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Neelamperoor Palli Bhagavathi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Neelamperoor Palli Bhagavathi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Neelamperoor Palli Bhagavathi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Neelamperoor Palli Bhagavathi Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Neelamperoor, Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary, Kurichy, Munroe Lighthouse, Kumarankary.
